name: Discrete

releases.author: shkarlsson
releases.description:
## Changes

- Plugin automatically applies new rules without having to toggle filter off and on
- Ribbon button added for quick on-off toggling
- Reworked menu layout

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shkarlsson/obsidian-discrete/compare/0.1.5...0.2.0
releases.name: Version 0.2.0 – UX Upgrades

releases.author: shkarlsson
releases.description:
Initial release of Discrete, a plugin for filtering files in Obsidian based on their frontmatter metadata.

## Features

- Filter files in the file explorer based on metadata matches
- Multiple comparison operators (equals, contains, exists, includes, greater/less than)
- Support for different value types (text, numbers, arrays, boolean)
- Combine multiple filters with AND/OR logic
- Quick filtering via right-click menu
- Show/hide matching files toggle

## Installation

1. Open Obsidian Settings
2. Go to Community Plugins and disable Safe Mode
3. Click Browse and search for "Discrete"
4. Install and enable the plugin

For more details, see the [**README**](https://github.com/shkarlsson/obsidian-discrete#readme).
releases.name: Version 0.1.5 - Adjusted Initial Release

Install and enable the plugin
